subparts.text: Comprehensively explain the concept of Computer Security Incident Response Strategy and give technical justification for employing computationally intensive Intrusion Detection Systems for ensuring Network Security.
Quantitatively differentiate between User Authentication and Authorization in Cyber Security giving suitable examples.
Categorically explain the Identity Theft and Fraud type of Cyber Crime and give suitable countermeasures for overcoming these.
Categorically explain the process of using Netcat during initial response while performing the Cyber Forensic Analysis. Give suitable illustrations.
Explain the significance of creating a reliable TCP connection between the Target System and Forensic Workstation during Cyber Forensic Analysis. Give suitable illustrations with examples.
Quantitatively differentiate between OSPF Unicast Routing Protocol and MOSPF Multicast Routing Protocol with suitable illustrations.
